stories.title: Everything that will decide Knicks-Spurs
stories.summary: The red-hot Knicks face the rising young Spurs. Our experts examine everything to know ahead of Wednesday's Game 1 (8:30 ET, ABC)

stories.title: WCF win gets Wemby closer to 'childhood dream'
stories.summary: The Spurs eliminated the defending champion Thunder in Game 7 of the Western Conference finals, a 111-103 victory fueled by center Victor Wembanyama's 22 points and seven rebounds.

stories.title: KO'd by Spurs, OKC says no excuses, 'get better'
stories.summary: The Thunder tipped their cap to the Spurs after a disappointing Game 7 loss and set out to "try to get over the hump" against a team that looms as a long-term roadblock.

stories.title: Bettors heavily invested in Knicks to win Finals
stories.summary: At DraftKings Sportsbook in New York, the Knicks have attracted nearly half of all money wagered on the NBA Finals winner this season -- almost as much as every other team combined.

stories.title: A's get wrong end of ABS gaffe against Yankees
stories.summary: The ABS system appeared to hit a rare glitch when a pitch to A's left fielder Tyler Soderstrom was confirmed as a strike even though the replay showed it missed the zone by a little less than an inch.
